title: Claude Fable 5 designs a 3D-printable model in a Claude-built CAD editor
summary: Claude Fable 5 demonstrates a browser-based CAD editor that it created, complete with an integrated AI copilot for 3D modeling. The tool is capable of designing 3D-printable models end-to-end within the editor interface.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 building a browser-based CAD editor and then using it to design a 3D-printable model end-to-end inside that same interface. The editor includes an integrated AI copilot for 3D modeling, so the demonstration covers both the generated tool and its application. The takeaway: a single model handles the code generation that produces the CAD environment and the modeling work performed within it.
